subject: Social Sciences
title: Climate Zones Challenge
tagline: Match climate zones, rainfall patterns and biomes of the world!

pins.name: Highveld
facts: The Highveld has warm summers and cold, dry winters.
Johannesburg lies on the Highveld plateau.

pins.name: Mediterranean (Cape)
facts: The Cape has a Mediterranean climate with winter rainfall.
Cape Town has hot, dry summers and mild, wet winters.

pins.name: Subtropical Coast
facts: The KZN coast is warm and humid with summer rainfall.
Durban has a subtropical climate most of the year.

pins.name: Semi-Desert (Karoo)
facts: The Karoo is a semi-desert with very low rainfall.
The Karoo has huge temperature swings between day and night.

pins.name: Desert (Kalahari)
facts: The Kalahari is an arid desert region in the north.
The Kalahari receives less than 250mm of rain a year.

pins.name: Escarpment
facts: The Drakensberg escarpment has the coldest temperatures in SA.
Snow can fall on the Drakensberg escarpment in winter.

questions.question: Which one is true: "The Highveld has warm summers and cold, dry winters."?
questions.feedbackFact: The Highveld has warm summers and cold, dry winters.
